No Poverty.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) by preparing students for the DELF B2 exam, which offers 'real added value' for university admission and future employment (Target 4.4). 'L'enseignement' is also an explicit weekly topic.
evidence: Permettre aux étudiants d’acquérir le niveau B2 du CECRL

Gender Equality.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The DELF B2 certificate provides 'real added value' for university admission and is recommended for studying abroad, indirectly contributing to future decent work and economic growth (Target 8.5).
evidence: cet acquis présente une réelle valeur ajoutée lors de l'examen des dossiers des candidats à l'entrée à l'université

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address reduced inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course explicitly covers vocabulary related to 'La circulation / les transports' and 'Le logement' as weekly themes, directly addressing components of sustainable cities (Targets 11.1, 11.2).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course explicitly includes 'La consommation' (consumption) as a weekly vocabulary theme, which is relevant to fostering awareness for sustainable consumption patterns (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address life below water.

Life on Land.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers vocabulary for 'La justice' (justice) and 'Les médias' (media) as weekly themes, relating to rule of law (Target 16.3) and public access to information (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters 'Abilities of global mobility' and prepares students for university stays in francophone countries, promoting international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
evidence: 具備國際交流基本知能 Abilities of global mobility
En cas de séjour universitaire dans un pays francophone, le DELF B2 est fortement conseillé.
